meta.source: results.csv (fixtures) + v2/output/predictions.json (M1 Elo, M2 neural-ensemble, M3 conjunto+conformal)
meta.note: 72 group + 28 knockout matches (knockouts read from the authoritative feeds as the bracket resolves). Knockout predictions are the 90-min 1X2; result.advances carries who progressed (ET/penalties). Team display (Spanish/flags) is GUI-only in web/src/lib/teams.js.
